features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Built for modern API teams
features.apiDocsDesc: Interactive API documentation with Try It support. Auto-generated from your OpenAPI specs with versioning built in.
features.sdkGenDesc: Automatically generate client SDKs in multiple languages. Keep your developers productive with type-safe integrations.
features.analyticsDesc: Track API usage, monitor performance, and gain insights into how developers interact with your platform.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.desc: Explore our products and start building with powerful, well-documented APIs.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions
faq.q1: How do I get started with the API?
faq.a1: Browse our product catalog, select the API you need, and follow the getting started guide in the documentation. Each product includes interactive examples and code samples.
faq.a2: We support API key authentication, OAuth 2.0, and JWT bearer tokens depending on the product. Check the specific product documentation for details.
faq.q3: Is there a rate limit on API calls?
faq.a3: Rate limits vary by product and plan. Each product's documentation includes information about rate limits and how to handle them gracefully.

error.404Desc: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

error.500Desc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

page.noContent: This page has no content yet.
